name: xdm_responsive_shell_views_overlay
description: Splits the monolithic Avalonia window into eight dedicated page views, adds responsive SplitView navigation with full, compact, and overlay modes, preserves keyboard shortcuts and storage-picker workflows, and adds shell architecture qualification tests.
commitMessage: Add responsive shell and dedicated page views
constraints: Do not restore or build WPF, GTK, WinForms, CoreFx or MSIX targets
Preserve the existing eight-section navigation and all view-model bindings
Preserve Ctrl+N, Ctrl+F, Ctrl+1 through Ctrl+8 and bulk keyboard shortcuts
Keep high contrast, UI scaling, RTL flow direction and live status announcements functional
Require zero warnings and zero errors
